elements.text: Essential Earthquake and Seismology Websites Earthquakes in NC workshop

content.text: IRIS Incorporated Research Institutions for Seismology
– Interactive global map of earthquake data
- Within 24 hours of a major earthquake, downloadable presentation with pictures, history and information about the earthquake
– View and analyze seismograms in real time
IRIS Education and Public Outreach Page
– links to videos, animations and lesson plans for many earthquake related concepts.
USGS United States Geological Survey Hazards Program
- Info for real time data, historical info, hazards, report an earthquake, shake maps, and more:
– Become a “virtual seismologist” excellent one or two day class lesson about earthquakes and seismology. Locate earthquake epicenters and measure earthquake magnitude.
(As a teacher you may purchase 3 seismometers for use in the classroom for $5 each)
Northern California Earthquake Data Center - ANSS Advanced National Seismic System
– Download large data files for GIS mapping.
